content: AutoList column resizing: use TanStack Table enableColumnResizing + columnResizeMode='onEnd'. Persist ColumnSizingState to localStorage keyed 'lk-col-widths:<schemaName>'. Add resize handle div with getResizeHandler() inside relative-positioned th. Set table-layout:fixed and getTotalSize() for table width.

fetchAppConfig caching: only cache when json.data is present (success). On fetch error or missing data, return fallback without caching so next page load retries. Prevents permanent empty admin menus after server startup glitch.

Saved filter presets for AutoList: useSavedViews hook persists named filter presets to localStorage keyed by 'linchkit:saved-views:{schemaName}'. SavedViewTabs renders tab strip above ListView. Schema-list.tsx tracks currentBazzaFilters via onFiltersChange callback to enable the save button. activeSavedView applies filter override to data before passing to AutoList.
